differential_diagnoses: Bipolar disorder with catatonic or encephalopathic features
next_steps: Order urgent serum TSH, free T4, and total T3 to evaluate for thyrotoxicosis
Obtain serum TSH receptor antibody (TRAb) levels
Consider thyroid ultrasound with Doppler flow
Continue supportive care with careful monitoring for autonomic instability and seizures
Consult endocrinology for management of suspected thyroid dysfunction
Monitor vital signs continuously for signs of thyroid storm (Burch-Wartofsky point scale)
Perform lumbar puncture for autoimmune encephalitis panel if thyroid studies are non-contributory
